seo.title: Contact TheNextGen — Healthcare Marketing in Irving, Texas
seo.description: Tell us about your practice — we respond within 4 business hours with a custom roadmap. Calls, audits and quotes for clinics, medspas, urgent care & ERs.

hero.lede: Answer 4 quick questions about your facility, scale, budget, and goals — we'll send a custom marketing roadmap within one business half-day.

facility.title: Which type of facility do you operate?
facility.sub: Each specialty has its own patient psychology and acquisition dynamics. We'll match you with the right playbook.

scale.title: How many physical locations do you operate?
scale.sub: Scale changes everything — from local SEO strategy to multi-location reputation systems.

budget.title: Current or projected monthly ad spend?
budget.sub: This helps us scope the right channel mix and forecast realistic patient acquisition velocity for your practice.

goals.title: What are your main growth objectives?
goals.sub: Select all that apply — we'll prioritize the right tactics in your custom roadmap.

contact.title: Where should we send your custom roadmap?
contact.sub: We'll send your tailored growth plan and pricing within 4 business hours — straight to your inbox.

success.title: Your roadmap is on the way.
success.body: We've received your details and will respond within 4 business hours with a custom marketing plan tailored to your practice.

info.title: Prefer email or a quick message?
info.subtitle: Send us a general inquiry, subscribe for healthcare marketing insights, or reach our team directly through the channels below.

inquiry.title: Send us a message
inquiry.text: Have a question, a complaint, or need help choosing the right service for your practice? Feel free to contact us — we typically reply in under 4 hours.

errors.missing: Please fill in first name, last name, email, and message.

inquiry.success: Message sent! We will respond within 4 hours.

newsletter.title: Healthcare growth, weekly.
newsletter.text: Field-tested patient acquisition tactics, HIPAA updates, and case studies from 200+ Texas practices — delivered every Tuesday morning. No fluff, no spam.
newsletter.success: Thank you! You'll get updates soon.
